infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Showing Trail uses your location to show nearby properties and help plan showing routes.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Showing Trail uses your location to show nearby properties and help plan showing routes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Showing Trail needs access to your photos to upload property images.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Showing Trail needs camera access to capture property photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Showing Trail needs microphone access to record audio with property videos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Showing Trail uses your location to show nearby properties and help plan showing routes.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Showing Trail to access your photos to upload property images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Showing Trail to access your camera to capture property photos.
